name: James Wilson
comment: The quality of the lemongrass oil from Kodai Global Exports is exceptional. The citral content is consistently high, and the packaging is perfect for international shipping.

name: Maria Garcia
comment: Reliable supplier and great communication. We've been sourcing our essential oils from them for over two years now, and they never disappoint.

name: Arjun Mehta
comment: Good quality product and timely delivery. The team is professional and handles bulk orders very efficiently.

name: Sophie Chen
comment: We use their lemongrass oil in our premium skincare line. The purity is unmatched, and it blends beautifully with our other ingredients.
